// // This comment suggests that g is set to 0 when d, e, and f are all 1, which is incorrect.
module top_module (
	input d, 
	input e, 
	input f, 
	output reg g);assign g = (d & ~e & f) | (~d & e & f) | (d & e & ~f);
	
endmodule
